name: book-editor-skill
description: A book-editing and writing-coach toolkit: a staged manuscript editor and a voice-first humanizer.

plugins.name: book-editor
plugins.description: A full editor for memoir, narrative non-fiction, and literary fiction. Assesses the manuscript first, then edits in staged passes (developmental, line, voice, copyedit, proofread), auto-fixing mechanics and proposing substantive changes for approval.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Voice-first editor that strips AI tells (em dashes, reflective-summary endings, telling-not-showing, stock cliches, course boilerplate) while protecting the author's voice. Includes an enforced mechanical checker.
